title: melaleuca lasiandra
intro: Melaleuca lasiandra, also known as the cajeput, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family (Myrtaceae) native to Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Melaleuca lasiandra include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Melaleuca lasiandra include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
